catalog_content:
Item Name: NY SPICE SHOP Lady Lavender Herb Tea – Herbal Leaves Blend – All Natural Flavored Loose Leaf (4 Ounce)
Bullet Point 1: PERFECT INGREDIENTS FOR LADY LAVENDER HERBAL – Herbal teas are made from plant leaves like black tea, lavender, orange peel, mallow flowers, bergamot & vanilla flavoring. Herbal teas, sometimes called tisanes, are very similar to white teas, but they contain a blend of herbs, spices, fruits or other plants in addition to tea leaves. Herbal teas don’t contain caffeine, which is why they’re known for their calming properties.
Bullet Point 2: NY SPICE SHOP NATURALLY CAFFEINE-FREE - In fact, herbal teas are especially beneficial to those who want the benefits of tea but also wish to avoid caffeine. If you're a coffee or green tea drinker looking for a caffeine-free alternative, herbal teas offer so many health benefits and can be just as tasty! One major distinction of herbal tea is that it's often naturally caffeine-free. Caffeine-free makes them perfect for those seeking an alternative to other beverages.
Bullet Point 3: LADY LAVENDER HERBAL | BOOSTING THE POWER OF HERBAL TEA - Herbal tea has been used as a herbal remedy for centuries, and it's no wonder why. It is safe, easy to make, delicious, and full of health benefits. Boosting herbal teas with superfoods is nothing new, in fact, it's been done for thousands of years by cultures all over the world who added other natural remedies to their herbal tea recipes.
Bullet Point 4: LAVENDER AT ITS BEST. You'll like the smell of lavender tea makes you relaxing and comfortable. You'll be familiar with the lovely smell. If you like drinking herbal tea in fall and winter every year. This year try lavender tea. It’s rich in flavor and also just good for scent in a wax burner. Fresh and subtle, the perfect new ingredient to bake with!!! So great. You'll love the smell of lavender. You can use it in baking and add it to coffee and tea. The aroma and taste are incredible.
Bullet Point 5: USES AND VERY FRAGRANT - This lavender is very fragrant, much like if you were to pick it fresh from your yard. It will be in a foil lined bag that's resealable. The perfect touch for bridal shower favors. Very fragrant, tastes great when added to simple syrup and as a tea. Great product! You can use it for making Lavender lemonade. This flavor is amazing and everyone will love it. You can make lavender crème brulee. Very fresh, you can use it in a number of recipes.
Product Description: Herbal Tea
Value: 4.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Herbal tea blend with natural ingredients, positioned as a caffeine-free, calming beverage. Standard loose-leaf packaging with resealable foil lining. Mid-range pricing expected due to natural ingredients and health-focused positioning, but no premium or organic certifications visible.
